name: three-model-viewer
description: VS Code extension to preview 3D models using three.js

threeModelViewer.tcpPort.description: TCP port for receiving joint angles from external programs (e.g. C++ controller)

scripts.release: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('package.json','utf8'));const v=p.version.split('.');v[2]=String(Number(v[2])+1);p.version=v.join('.');fs.writeFileSync('package.json',JSON.stringify(p,null,2)+'\n');console.log('Version bumped to '+p.version)" && npx vsce package --allow-missing-repository
